_rules.scope: Per-task explicit rubrics for ASE-Bench judge v2. Reference values were COMPUTED with ASE 3.27 + EMT in the benchmark's own environment (reference_facts.py), not guessed. The judge applies ONLY these criteria; nothing the rubric does not mention may be penalized.
_rules.nan_quirk: ASE itself produces a nan third cell row when add_vacuum() is applied to a cell with a zero c-vector (e.g. surface('Cu',(h,k,l),n) string form, or mx2() without vacuum). A printed nan cell that comes from this literal-compliance path is verdict 1 (vacuum not realized in the cell), NEVER 0. A clean cell with correct vacuum is verdict 2. Do not treat quirk-nan as a model bug.
_rules.vib_zero_modes: ASE prints near-zero and small imaginary translational/rotational modes as a matter of course. Only the physical modes matter; never penalize near-zero/imaginary trans-rot modes.
_rules.units: Accept equivalent units and reasonable rounding everywhere (cm^-1 vs eV vs meV, A^3 per atom vs per cell) unless the prompt names a unit; then the named unit must appear with a correctly converted value.
_rules.extra_output: Extra prints, logs, optimizer tables are never penalized. Only missing/wrong required items count.

required: builds Cu FCC bulk and a 2x2x2 supercell
prints cell info
prints atom count = 8 (primitive base) or 32 (cubic base)
T01.verdict_2: cell printed and count is 8 or 32
T01.verdict_1: count right but cell info missing (or vice versa)
T01.verdict_0: any other count (e.g. 4, 16) or no supercell made
T01.ambiguity: primitive (8) vs conventional (32) base both valid

required: Pt(111) slab with 4 layers + CO adsorbed ontop
vacuum 10 set
prints final atom count, which must equal 4*k+2 for the chosen k=a*b surface size
T02.verdict_2: count printed and consistent with a 4-layer slab + 2 CO atoms (n = 4k+2)
T02.verdict_1: structure right but count not printed, or vacuum missing
T02.verdict_0: wrong layer count, CO missing/dissociated handling, or count inconsistent with the built slab
T02.ambiguity: surface size (a,b) is the model's choice

required: MoS2 monolayer (mx2 builder OR a correct manual 1T/2H cell): 3 atoms, hexagonal a in 3.12-3.20 (mx2 default 3.18, experimental 3.16)
10 A vacuum added
prints cell size
T03.verdict_2: a in 3.12-3.20 visible and c reflects vacuum (>=10, clean numbers)
T03.verdict_1: a in range but c is nan via the add_vacuum-on-2D ASE quirk (see _rules.nan_quirk)
T03.verdict_0: wrong lattice (a outside 3.12-3.20), non-hexagonal/wrong structure, or cell not printed
T03.ambiguity: mx2(vacuum=10), add_vacuum, or manual cell all fine

required: H2O + EMT + BFGS optimization
prints energy before AND after
final energy ~1.879 eV (universal EMT minimum, tol 0.04)
T04.verdict_2: both energies printed, final ~1.879, final <= initial
T04.verdict_1: optimization right but one of the two energies not printed
T04.verdict_0: final energy far from 1.879 (stuck/not converged, e.g. 3.30), or no optimization
T04.ambiguity: initial geometry is the model's choice, so e_before is free

required: EOS fit for Cu FCC over scaled volumes
prints equilibrium volume (11.57 A^3/atom or 46.3 A^3/conv cell, tol ~3%)
prints bulk modulus 133.6 GPa (tol 8) or 0.834 eV/A^3 (tol 0.05) with the matching unit label
T05.verdict_2: V0 and B both right with sane unit labels; if a lattice constant is also printed it is 3.55-3.65
T05.verdict_1: V0 and B right but a unit label mismatched (e.g. eV/A^3 value labeled GPa)
T05.verdict_0: claims equilibrium lattice constant ~2.26 (= V0^(1/3) mistake), or V0/B wrong (e.g. V0=2.89)
T05.ambiguity: per-atom vs per-conventional-cell volume both fine if labeled

required: Langevin MD 300K, 100 steps, 5 fs on Cu 2x2x2
prints initial AND final temperature and energy
T06.verdict_2: all four values printed, final T in a plausible 50-900 K band, no nan
T06.verdict_1: MD ran correctly but one of the prints missing
T06.verdict_0: wrong dynamics (not Langevin), nan/exploding values, or wrong step count/timestep
T06.ambiguity: friction value is free; T fluctuates strongly in 32-atom cells

required: VelocityVerlet NVE 50 steps, MaxwellBoltzmann 300K init
prints initial and final TOTAL (kin+pot) energy
energy conserved: |dE| < 0.1 eV
T07.verdict_1: conserved but printed only potential or only the difference
T07.verdict_0: |dE| large (>0.1 eV), or no MB initialization, or NVT used
T07.ambiguity: timestep choice free if sane (<=5 fs)

required: N2 vibrational frequencies with EMT via ase.vibrations.Vibrations
prints frequency values
T08.verdict_2: frequencies printed; the physical stretch is ~928 cm^-1 (G2 geometry, unoptimized) OR ~1231 cm^-1 (EMT-optimized geometry, d=0.998) — both computed references, tol ~5%; eV equivalents fine
T08.verdict_1: vib ran but only energies-in-eV table without explicit frequencies, or stretch value off by unit confusion while calc itself right
T08.verdict_0: no vibration calc, fabricated values, or crash hidden by try/except

reference_facts.note: optimizing before vib is good practice, not an error; near-zero/imaginary trans-rot modes are normal (see _rules)

T08.ambiguity: optimize-first or direct vib both valid; cm^-1 or eV both fine

required: writes Cu FCC bulk as VASP POSCAR and reads it back
prints atom count and cell parameters after the round trip
T09.verdict_2: round trip done; count (1 prim or 4 cubic, or N if repeated) and cell consistent before/after
T09.verdict_1: round trip done but only one of count/cell printed
T09.verdict_0: no read-back, or cell/count corrupted by the round trip
T09.ambiguity: primitive or cubic base both fine

required: ase.cluster.Octahedron Cu length=5
prints atom count = 85
prints positions shape (85, 3)
T10.verdict_0: any other atom count (cutoff misused etc.)

required: bulk('Al','bcc',a=3.3,cubic=True)
prints cell showing 3.3 edges
prints chemical formula Al2
T11.verdict_2: cell 3.3 and formula Al2 (2 atoms) printed
T11.verdict_1: structure right but formula or cell print missing
T11.verdict_0: 1-atom primitive (cubic ignored), wrong lattice constant, or fcc used

required: Ti HCP with a=2.95 and c/a=1.59 (c=4.6905)
prints cell vectors
prints atomic positions
T12.verdict_2: cell vectors show a=2.95 and c=4.6905 (tol 0.01); positions printed (2 atoms)
T12.verdict_1: values right but positions or vectors print missing
T12.verdict_0: c/a not applied (default c), or wrong a

required: Si diamond a=5.43, 3x3x3 supercell
prints atom count 216 (cubic) or 54 (primitive)
prints cell volume 4322.8 (cubic) or 1080.7 (prim), tol 0.5%
T13.verdict_2: count and volume printed and consistent (216/4322.8 or 54/1080.7)
T13.verdict_1: count right but volume missing (or vice versa)
T13.ambiguity: primitive vs conventional base both valid

required: ase.spacegroup.crystal NaCl sg=225, a=5.64, Na(0,0,0) Cl(.5,.5,.5)
prints atom count = 8
prints chemical symbols (Na and Cl visible)
T14.verdict_0: 2-atom manual cell without spacegroup machinery, or wrong count
T14.ambiguity: none (sg 225 gives 8 in the cubic cell)

required: fcc100('Cu', size=(3,3,3), vacuum=12)
prints atom count = 27
prints cell info
T15.verdict_2: 27 atoms and cell printed (z includes vacuum)
T15.verdict_0: wrong count (size misread as layers etc.)

required: bcc110('Fe', size=(2,2,4), vacuum=10)
prints atom count = 16
prints cell size
T16.verdict_2: 16 atoms (32 only if an explicitly doubled cell is built) and cell printed

required: uses ase.build.surface() with (2,1,1), 3 layers on Cu
adds 10 A vacuum
prints atom count: 12 (string/cubic lattice form) or 3 (primitive bulk form)
prints cell
T17.verdict_2: count is 12 or 3 AND printed cell is clean (vacuum visible)
T17.verdict_1: count is 12 or 3 but cell shows the add_vacuum nan quirk (see _rules.nan_quirk) — DO NOT give 0 for nan here
T17.verdict_0: surface() not used, wrong miller/layers, or count not 12/3

reference_facts.nan_source: ASE: surface('Cu',...) string form has zero c-vector; add_vacuum then yields nan row

T17.ambiguity: string-lattice (12 atoms) vs primitive-bulk (3 atoms) input both valid

required: molecule('CH4') from G2
prints atomic coordinates
prints bond length(s) ~1.087-1.094 A
prints formula CH4
T18.verdict_2: coords + C-H bond ~1.09 + CH4 all present
T18.verdict_1: two of the three print groups present
T18.verdict_0: not from G2 / wrong molecule / fabricated geometry
T18.ambiguity: bond length print format free (single value or list)

required: manual Atoms: C at origin, O at +/-1.16 on an axis
cell 10x10x10, pbc=False
computes distances via the ASE distance API (get_distances or Atoms.get_distance/get_all_distances — all acceptable) and prints them
C-O = 1.16 AND O-O = 2.32 visible (tol 0.03)
T19.verdict_0: wrong geometry (e.g. both O on the same side) or distances hardcoded instead of computed

required: nanotube(6, 6, length=4)
prints atom count = 96
prints cell info
T20.verdict_2: 96 atoms (144/240 acceptable only if a longer-length convention is explicit in code) + cell printed
T20.verdict_0: wrong chirality or count inconsistent with code
T20.ambiguity: length convention variants exist but ase nanotube(length=4) = 96

required: Icosahedron('Au', noshells=3)
prints atom count = 55
prints center of mass (~origin)
Al(111) 3-layer slab; N2 from molecule() adsorbed on the bridge site at height 2.0
vacuum 10
prints atom count (= 3k+2) and atom types (Al, N)
T22.verdict_2: count = 3k+2, both element types printed, AND the site is handled credibly: add_adsorbate(...,'bridge'-style site or explicit bridge position) OR manual placement whose coordinates are clearly the midpoint of two surface Al atoms
T22.verdict_1: count/types right but the placement is manual at an arbitrary position (site not verifiably bridge), or one print missing — DECISION RULE: manual-translate placement is NEVER verdict 0 if the structure is otherwise right; it is exactly verdict 1
T22.verdict_0: N2 not from molecule(), N2 dissociated/missing, or count inconsistent with the built slab
T22.ambiguity: surface size free; N2 orientation free; add_adsorbate not mandatory if bridge coords are explicit

required: Pt(111) 3-layer slab x3 with OH on ontop, bridge, fcc sites
EMT single-point energy for each
prints the three energies AND an explicit lowest-site comparison
T23.verdict_2: 3 distinct site energies + explicit winner statement
T23.verdict_1: 3 energies printed but no comparison, or one site misplaced
T23.verdict_0: fewer than 3 sites, same energy repeated (sites not actually different), or no EMT attach

reference_facts.note: adsorption height is the model's choice -> winning site not pinned; internal consistency is what's graded

T23.ambiguity: OH built manually or via molecule('OH') both fine

required: Au FCC bulk + EMT + LBFGS fmax=0.01
prints number of steps and final energy
T24.verdict_2: steps printed (small: bulk is at symmetry minimum, typically 0-2) and energy ~0.0026*n_atoms eV (prim 0.0026, cubic 0.0104; tol 0.05)
T24.verdict_1: opt right but steps or energy print missing
T24.verdict_0: energy wildly off for the built cell, or optimizer never run
T24.ambiguity: any supercell size fine if energy scales accordingly

required: Cu FCC + FrechetCellFilter + BFGS fmax=0.01 (cell AND positions)
prints cell size and energy before AND after
relaxed lattice ~3.589 conventional (or 2.538 primitive edge)
T25.verdict_2: before/after cell+energy printed; relaxed cell at EMT equilibrium
T25.verdict_1: relaxation right but one before/after print missing
T25.verdict_0: no cell filter (positions-only), or cell unchanged/wrong
T25.ambiguity: primitive or cubic cell both fine

required: Ni FCC + PreconLBFGS(precon='auto') + EMT, fmax=0.01
prints steps, final energy, cell parameters
T26.verdict_2: PreconLBFGS actually used with precon='auto'; all three prints present; values finite
T26.verdict_1: ran but one print missing, or silently fell back to another optimizer with a note
T26.verdict_0: PreconLBFGS not used (plain LBFGS/BFGS without acknowledgment), or crash-masked

reference_facts.note: positions-only on perfect bulk converges immediately; that is fine

T26.ambiguity: cell relaxation not required by the prompt

required: Bussi NVT 500K, Ag 2x2x2, 200 steps, 5 fs
temperature recorded/printed every 50 steps (>=4 values)
T27.verdict_2: >=4 T samples printed, values in a 100-1200 K plausible band
T27.verdict_1: MD right but fewer samples printed than asked
T27.verdict_0: not Bussi, nan/exploded T, or no sampling

required: Langevin MD with temperature ramp 300K -> 600K over 200 steps (set_temperature or equivalent per-interval update)
prints current T every 50 steps
T28.verdict_2: ramp implemented (target T actually changes during the run) + T prints; T trend upward overall
T28.verdict_1: ramp implemented but trend unclear due to noise in a small cell (T prints present)
T28.verdict_0: constant-T run (no ramp), or no periodic prints
T28.ambiguity: linear step-wise or per-50-steps jump both fine

required: VelocityVerlet NVE, Pd 2x2x2, 500K MB init, 2 fs, 200 steps
prints the start-end TOTAL energy difference
|dE| < 0.1 eV
T29.verdict_1: conserved but printed start/end without the explicit difference
T29.verdict_0: large drift, or potential-only energies compared

required: NPTBerendsen 300K 1 bar, Cu 3x3x3, 200 steps, timestep 5fs, taut=100fs, taup=1000fs
prints initial AND final volume AND pressure
T30.verdict_2: all four values printed, volume change modest (<20%), no nan
T30.verdict_1: ran right but pressure print missing (volume only)
T30.verdict_0: nan/exploded, compressibility unit botched (volume collapses), or wrong thermostat
T30.ambiguity: pressure may be reported via stress trace; that is fine

required: NPTBerendsen 500K at 10 GPa, Al 2x2x2, 100 steps
explicit GPa -> eV/A^3 conversion in code (10 GPa = 0.0624 eV/A^3) or units.GPa used
prints initial and final volume; final < initial (compression)
T31.verdict_2: conversion correct + volumes printed + volume decreased
T31.verdict_1: conversion correct but compression not visible in only 100 steps (volumes printed)
T31.verdict_0: pressure passed in wrong units (e.g. raw 10), or volume increased strongly / nan
T31.ambiguity: exact final volume depends on taup; direction is what's graded

required: H2O vibrations with EMT
prints each mode in cm^-1 AND in eV (both units required by the prompt)
T32.verdict_2: modes listed in both units; physical modes match a computed reference set: ~3746/4388 cm^-1 (G2 geometry) OR ~259/2393/3125 cm^-1 (EMT-optimized geometry) — tol ~5%
T32.verdict_1: calc right but only one unit printed
T32.verdict_0: no vib run, fabricated table, or crash-masked

reference_facts.note: optimizing before vib is valid; EMT H2O has no ~1600 bend; near-zero/imag trans-rot modes normal

T32.ambiguity: optimize-first or direct vib both valid; mode count/order free

required: CH4: BFGS optimize FIRST, then Vibrations with EMT
filters and prints only REAL frequencies
T33.verdict_2: opt-then-vib order correct + real-only filtering + values ~2474 (x3) and 2649 cm^-1 (tol ~5%)
T33.verdict_1: order correct but filtering shows all modes (real ones still identifiable)
T33.verdict_0: no optimization first, or no filtering at all when imaginary modes present

required: NEB: Cu adatom fcc->hcp hollow on Cu(111), 5 images, IDPP interpolation (interpolate(method='idpp'))
endpoints are relaxed adatom minima at the two sites
prints energy barrier = E_max - E_initial
T34.verdict_2: 5 images + idpp + barrier printed, 0 < barrier < 1.0 eV (EMT typical 0.02-0.2)
T34.verdict_1: NEB correct but barrier extracted as max-image energy without subtracting E_initial (or 3/7 images)
T34.verdict_0: no NEB (single relaxation), barrier <= 0 or absurd (>1 eV), endpoints not fcc/hcp sites
T34.ambiguity: slab size / fixed-layer choice free -> exact barrier value not pinned

required: manual Al endpoint Atoms (third Al moving between two fixed), EMT, 3 images, LINEAR interpolation
prints the energy of each image
T35.verdict_2: 3 image energies printed; middle image energy >= endpoint energies
T35.verdict_1: energies printed but middle < endpoints (pathological setup, still a real NEB)
T35.verdict_0: no NEB / images not interpolated / fewer than 3 energies

reference_facts.note: manual setup -> values not pinned; shape of the band is graded

required: Ag FCC EOS: 7 points within +/-5% lattice scaling
Birch-Murnaghan fit (eos='birchmurnaghan')
prints equilibrium lattice constant ~4.064 (tol 0.04) and B ~99.8 GPa (tol 8, GPa explicit in prompt)
T36.verdict_2: a0 and B(GPa) both right; 7-point +/-5% grid implemented
T36.verdict_1: values right but grid is not exactly 7 points / +/-5%
T36.verdict_0: B left in eV/A^3 while labeled GPa, wrong a0 (e.g. volume-cube-root 2.56), or non-BM fit silently
T36.ambiguity: scaling volumes vs lattice constants both fine if +/-5%

required: N2 vib (EMT) then IdealGasThermo with geometry='linear', symmetrynumber=2
Gibbs free energy at 298.15 K, 101325 Pa printed
T37.verdict_2: G matches a computed reference: +0.103 (unopt, with Epot) / -0.446 (unopt, Epot=0) / -0.158 (optimized geometry, with Epot) / -0.421 (optimized, Epot=0) eV, tol 0.05
T37.verdict_1: machinery right but G off by inclusion of spurious vib modes (value within ~0.15 of a reference)
T37.verdict_0: wrong geometry/symmetry args, pressure in wrong units, or fabricated G
T37.ambiguity: including EMT potential energy or not, optimizing N2 first or not — all four combinations defensible

required: Cu bulk vibrations (EMT) -> HarmonicThermo
Helmholtz free energy at 300 K printed in eV
T38.verdict_2: vib energies fed to HarmonicThermo (real modes only), finite F printed in eV
T38.verdict_1: ran but imaginary-mode filtering ad hoc / F printed without unit
T38.verdict_0: no vib calc, crash-masked, or nonsense F (nan)

reference_facts.note: value depends on chosen cell size -> not pinned; machinery + finiteness graded

required: Au FCC bulk written to XYZ and read back
prints atom types (Au) and positions after read-back
T39.verdict_2: round trip + both prints; positions survive (plain xyz losing the cell is fine)
T39.verdict_1: round trip but one print missing
T39.ambiguity: extxyz or plain xyz both fine

required: NaCl crystal (sg 225) written to CIF and read back
prints spacegroup info (225 / Fm-3m) and atom count
T40.verdict_2: spacegroup info shown and count is 8 (or 2 if the CIF reader returned the primitive cell — explicitly acceptable). NOTE: ase.io.write CIF stores P1 symmetry, so a read-back legitimately reports P1 — printing P1 (or 225 from the pre-write object) BOTH count as spacegroup info shown
T40.verdict_1: count right but no spacegroup print at all
T40.verdict_0: wrong structure (not rocksalt), or no read-back

reference_facts.spacegroup: 225 / Fm-3m / P1-after-roundtrip (ASE CIF writer loses symmetry)

T40.ambiguity: CIF primitive read-back (2 atoms) and P1 symmetry after round trip are ASE behavior, not errors

required: EMT MD on Cu bulk for 10 steps writing a Trajectory file
reads the trajectory back
prints total frame count and last-frame energy
T41.verdict_2: frame count printed and consistent with the save interval coded (10 or 11 typical) + finite last energy
T41.verdict_1: trajectory round trip fine but frame count inconsistent with interval (off-by-logging), or energy print missing
T41.verdict_0: no trajectory write/read, or unreadable file handling

required: ase.db database with Cu, Ag, Au bulks + EMT energies stored
db.select() query loop
prints each entry's formula and energy
T42.verdict_2: 3 entries queried back; formulas Cu/Ag/Au and 3 finite energies printed (per-atom singlepoints ~ -0.006/0.002/0.003 eV if unoptimized primitive; x4 if cubic; lower if optimized)
T42.verdict_1: db written but printed from the build loop rather than select(), or one entry missing
T42.verdict_0: no db usage, or energies absent/fabricated

required: db stores Cu slabs with 2, 3, 4 layers, each with a layers=N key-value pair
select(layers=3) retrieves exactly the 3-layer slab
prints its atom count
T43.verdict_2: selection by key works; printed count divisible by 3 and consistent with that slab's size
T43.verdict_1: stored right but selection prints all entries / count printed for the wrong reason
T43.verdict_0: layers not stored as key-value, or wrong slab retrieved

required: Cu(111) 4-layer slab; FixAtoms selecting the BOTTOM 2 layers via tags
BFGS+EMT optimization
prints fixed-atom coordinates before AND after, demonstrating they did not move
T44.verdict_2: fixed coords identical before/after (max delta ~1e-8) and tag selection is genuinely the bottom layers (ase tags: 1=top ... 4=bottom, so fixed = tags in {3,4})
T44.verdict_1: constraint works but the printed comparison is partial (e.g. only counts or only max displacement)
T44.verdict_0: tag direction inverted (top layers frozen — fixed atoms moved), or no before/after evidence
T44.ambiguity: selection by z-coordinate instead of tags acceptable if bottom 2 layers

required: H2 with FixBondLength fixing d=0.9 A
EMT energy
prints bond length and energy before and after applying the constraint (with dynamics/opt if used)
T45.verdict_2: bond stays 0.9 (tol 0.01) wherever motion is applied; energy printed (E at d=0.9 ~1.546 eV if positions are exactly at 0.9)
T45.verdict_1: constraint applied but no motion, so before/after trivially identical (prints present)
T45.verdict_0: bond drifts from 0.9 under opt (constraint not active), or no energy
T45.ambiguity: whether to run an optimizer is the model's choice

required: Pt(111) 3-layer slab + CO adsorbed
FixAtoms (bottom layer) AND FixBondLength (C-O) applied SIMULTANEOUSLY
BFGS to fmax=0.05
prints final energy and C-O distance
T46.verdict_2: both constraints in atoms.constraints; final C-O equals the bond length the model STARTED with (preservation is the criterion — initial choice of 1.10-1.25 is free, molecule('CO')=1.14, manual 1.2 also fine); energy printed
T46.verdict_1: both constraints set but C-O print missing, or one constraint applied after the other replaced it (clobbered) with otherwise right physics
T46.verdict_0: constraints.set overwrote one another (only one active) and C-O drifted, or no optimization
T46.ambiguity: slab size free -> energy not pinned

required: NeighborList with natural_cutoffs on Cu FCC 3x3x3
per-atom neighbor counts
prints average coordination number = 12 (tol 0.3)
T47.verdict_1: CN computed but only the distribution printed (12 inferable)
T47.verdict_0: CN far from 12 (self_interaction/bothways misused, non-periodic cell)
T47.ambiguity: bothways=True or double-count-then-halve both fine if result is 12

required: Cu FCC 2x2x2 supercell
get_distances(0, all others, mic=True)
prints min and max distance
T48.verdict_1: mic=True used and max right, but min = 0.0 because atom 0's self-distance was included ('other atoms' misread) or another sorting slip
T48.verdict_0: mic missing (max inflated beyond cell), or wrong supercell
T48.ambiguity: primitive vs cubic base both valid

required: EOS on Cu FCC -> equilibrium lattice constant ~3.59
fcc111 4-layer slab built WITH that constant
FixAtoms bottom 2 layers + EMT + BFGS relaxation
prints final energy and average z per layer (4 distinct values)
T49.verdict_2: a_eq 3.55-3.65 used; slab relaxed with bottom-2 fixed; energy + 4 layer-z values printed
T49.verdict_1: pipeline right but layer-z print partial (e.g. only top/bottom)
T49.verdict_0: EOS skipped (default a used), tags inverted, or prints missing

required: EOS fit per metal for Cu, Ag, Au with EMT
prints a comparison table with equilibrium lattice constant and bulk modulus per metal
T50.verdict_2: a0 = 3.59 / 4.064 / 4.056 (tol 0.04) and B = 133.6 / 99.8 / 173.2 GPa (tol ~12, or eV/A^3 equivalents labeled correctly) in a table-like output
T50.verdict_1: all three metals right but output not table-formatted, or one B unit-labeled wrong
T50.verdict_0: any metal's a0 wrong (e.g. cube-root error 2.26/2.56), or fewer than 3 metals
T50.ambiguity: eos type free (BM/sj) — values shift < tol
